task_completion.description: Verify the support ticket status is set to Closed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the ticket 'URGENT: Broken Blade on Mower' in the application and check that its Status field or badge clearly indicates 'Closed'.

task_completion.description: Verify the required comment was added to the ticket.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a comment or note section on the ticket containing the text 'Field technician completed repair on site.'

task_completion.description: Verify the resolution was recorded correctly on the ticket.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a resolution, solution, or closing notes field on the ticket containing the text 'Replaced primary cutting blade and balanced deck.'

task_completion.description: Verify the asset status is updated to In Service.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the asset record 'Mower ZTR-5000-A1' and check that its Status field or badge clearly indicates 'In Service'.

task_completion.description: Verify the asset Date in Service is set to 2026-03-09.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Date in Service' or similar date field on the 'Mower ZTR-5000-A1' asset record and verify it displays '2026-03-09'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the graphical user interface of the ticketing/asset management system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser or dedicated application interface being navigated, not terminal windows executing curl, API requests, or database scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just type the required answers into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text must appear within the structured form fields of the actual application, not in Notepad, TextEdit, or a generic text document.

integrity.description: Verify that the changes appear to be saved or submitted.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for visual cues that the forms were submitted, such as success messages, updated read-only views of the ticket/asset, or the absence of unsaved changes indicators.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verify the following exact values: Ticket Status must be 'Closed'. Ticket Comment must contain 'technician completed repair'. Ticket Resolution must contain 'Replaced primary cutting blade'. Asset Status must be 'In Service'. Asset Date in Service must be '2026-03-09'.
